subject: (no subject)
body:
I am writing to follow up to our meeting with LAnna on
June 14.. I believe , that when you had stated that
you thought a felony  for my client was needed,it
seems  you were unfortunately working from the wrong
set of assumptions.. I'm sure you will agree that it
quickly  became obvious at the meeting that the
allegations as read to us, differed dramatically  from
your initial understanding. You now are fully aware of
 the lack of credibility of the girl in question ,
coupled with the fact that you I realized you were
surprised to learn for the first time that there was
not even the slightest hint of an  allegation of
either oral or vaginal  sex.I realize this was in
contrast to  your prior understanding , and this 
,,coupled with the fact that I am told that  in the
past you have been crystal clear with Alan Dershowitz
that if my client "didn't get laid or get a blow job"
you wouldn't charge..  I am cognizant of the fact that
, at our meeting,  you clearly promised  that if the
police didn't modify their probable cause affadavit
you would not charge,, However, I can see no good
faith basis for a charge,in any case, seperate fromthe
apparent  desire to appease "law enforcement." . They
did their job, they I'm sure  initially believed the
facts to be different than they ultimately turned out
to be. It is also clear that the statements of the
girls might have been taken without the clearly
necessary skepticism. The facts of the case as you and
I now both understand it are as follows  : the girl ,
was brought to the house, by a stripper,one time, , my
client had never met her before,, she was   told to
lie about her age, which she did,, and my client's lie
detector test , administered by  George Slattery
,confirmed this . According to the statement that
Lanna read to you and I , the girl alleged that  she
did not get fully undressed,, she CLIMBED on top of
him, to give him a MASSAGE.. she alleges he
masturbated, she then got paid her agreed  two hundred
dollars, she left her phone number and said she would
like to come again with her twin sister,  my client
never  contacted  her again... someseveral  MONTHS
LATER ,we are told one of her parents,, BOTH
previously convicted of fraud, made  contact with the
police..( the complaining stepmother, just completing
her own PTI in March of this year.) THe girl
represents  her age on her own web page as 17,then
changes it  to 16,, then very  conveniently , four
days before the last scheduled grand jury  changes it
for a third time to 15. On this site accompanied with
a nude photo,, she  brags about shoplifting, drinking,
doing drugs  and  writes that she will have an income
of $250,000.( NO one has any  doubt how she intended
to get that money)  We have previously provided to
your office,, the copies of all the web sites showing
her examples of  misrepresentation of age. We have
also provided a copy of her most recent rendition of
her web site, appropiately  headlined" FUCK YA 2" ,
accompanied by a photo of her "straddling a man" in
which  she once again brags that  she has shoplifted
in the last month.. This is of course  seperate and
apart from the police report  we have previously 
provided ,from the  West Palm Beach Police ,
describing  the officers description of her inability
to stand due to drugs , returning home at 5;45 a.m.
with the local drug dealer and her fathers'( a
convicted felon ) statement that she has been using
drugs since the age of 14, when she was admitted  into
a  rehab facility. We have also provided, a copy of a
Georgia police report, detailing her lying, to her
parents,running away from home   and eventually being
found in a  disreputable drug environment.With all
this  and given the totality of the facts  I can see
no good faith basis for bringing a charge in this
case... THe policy of your office not to bring a
"touching " case,( illustrated by your story to Alan
of a 15 year old stripper being fondled) where there
is no aggravating circumstances is well founded... My
client was clearly  in no position of authority with 
respect to this girl,  and  she came both  voluntarily
and only once. even though Lanna stated she knows the
weakness of her case, as these "prostitutes" were
compliant and complicit,  and could live with a couple
of  misdemeanors,, I think we all realize that this is
not a case that should realistically  be brought at
all especially  to trial and therefore , really should
be dropped.. If you thought appropriate my client
would agree to stay our of palm beach ,, except for a
medical emergency, for a defined period of time..

__________________________________________________
